items.text:
🔍 *ENRICH REVIEW*  \[✨ ENRICHED\]

*Name:* Clonmacnoise
*Country:* ireland
*Region:* the heartlands
*County:* County Offaly
*Type:* abbey
*Period:* 6th century
*Coords:* 53.32388889, -7.99111111
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Clonmacnoise
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Clonmacnoise/@53.3259,-7.9858,15z
*Main Image:* https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d1/Clonmacnoise_6.jpg/330px-Clonmacnoise_6.jpg
*Gallery:* 0 images
*Image Source:* wikipedia
*Has Wikipedia:* yes
*Has Google Places:* unknown

*Description:*
Clonmacnoise or Clonmacnois is a ruined monastery in County Offaly in Ireland on the River Shannon south of Athlone, founded in 544 by Saint Ciarán, from Rathcroghan, County Roscommon. Until the 9th century it had close associations with the kings of Connacht.

_Listing 6 of 10_

items.text:
🔍 *ENRICH REVIEW*  \[✨ ENRICHED\]

*Name:* Ballyfin Demesne
*Country:* ireland
*Region:* the heartlands
*County:* County Laois
*Type:* castle
*Period:* 19th century
*Coords:* 53.0556, -7.4076
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ballyfin
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Ballyfin%20Demesne/@53.063,-7.56,15z
*Main Image:* https://img.castlecore.uk/ballyfin-demesne.jpg
*Gallery:* 4 images
*Image Source:* CDN
*Has Wikipedia:* yes
*Has Google Places:* unknown
*Enrich Notes:* https://www.ballyfin.com/ add source, tag as hotel

*Description:*
Ballyfin is a village and parish in the Slieve Bloom Mountains in County Laois, Ireland. It is around 8 km west of Portlaoise, on the L21121 local road which joins the R423 regional road between Mountrath and Mountmellick.

_Listing 7 of 10_
